nasb.text: Then you ought to have put my money in the bank, and on my arrival I would have received my money back with interest.

esv.text: Then you ought to have invested my money with the bankers, and at my coming I should have received what was my own with interest.

cnv.text: 那你就應該把我的錢存入銀行，到我回來的時候，可以連本帶利收回。

ccb.text: 就应该把钱存入钱庄，等我回来时，可以连本带利还给我。’

csbs.text: 你就应该把我的银子存到钱庄里，这样我回来的时候，可以连本带利得回来。
